scalar.description: Single value that can hold a number, string, or reference, prefixed with $

array.description: Ordered list of scalars with integer indices, prefixed with @

hash.description: Unordered collection of key-value pairs with string keys, prefixed with %

reference.description: Scalar value holding the memory address of another variable, enabling complex data structures

regex.description: Compiled regular expression object used in pattern matching and substitution

filehandle.description: I/O handle for reading/writing to files, pipes, and sockets

undef.description: Undefined value, equivalent to uninitialized; false in boolean context, 0 in numeric, empty in string

coderef.description: Reference to an anonymous or named subroutine, enables callbacks and closures
